name: code-analyzer
description: Analyze local codebases via MCP. Provides language breakdowns, dependency graphs, code quality pattern detection, and architecture maps for any repository on the local filesystem.
author: kronus-tech

tools.name: analyze_repo
tools.description: Analyze a local repository directory — file counts by language, top-level structure, key file presence.

tools.name: dependency_graph
tools.description: Parse package.json / requirements.txt / go.mod and return a structured dependency list.

tools.name: find_patterns
tools.description: Detect code quality patterns: large files, deep nesting, missing tests.

tools.name: architecture_map
tools.description: Generate a text-based architecture diagram of a repository.
